729	                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
730	                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">{currentWord.word}</h3>
731	                  <button
732	                    onClick={() => handlePlayWordAudio(currentWord)}
733	                    className="p-2 bg-brand-100 rounded-full text-brand-600"
734	                  >
735	                    <Volume2 size={16} />
736	                  </button>
737	                </div>
738	                <button onClick={() => setShowWordDetail(false)} className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-full">
739	                  <X size={20} className="text-gray-500" />
740	                </button>
741	              </div>
742	
743	              {/* 内容区 - 可滚动 */}
744	              <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
745	                {/* 基本信息 */}
746	                <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl p-4">
747	                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
748	                    {currentWord.phonetic && (
749	                      <span className="text-gray-600">{currentWord.phonetic}</span>
750	                    )}
751	                    {currentWord.pos && (
752	                      <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-white text-emerald-700 text-xs font-bold rounded-full">
753	                        {currentWord.pos}
754	                      </span>
755	                    )}
756	                  </div>
757	                  {currentWord.senses && currentWord.senses.length > 0 ? (
758	                    <div className="space-y-3">
759	                      {currentWord.senses.map((sense: NonNullable<Word['senses']>[number], idx: number) => (
760	                        <div key={`${sense.meaning}-${idx}`} className="rounded-lg bg-white/70 p-3">
761	                          <p
762	                            className={sense.important ? 'text-lg font-bold text-gray-900' : 'text-sm font-medium text-gray-700'}
763	                          >
764	                            {sense.meaning}
765	                          </p>
766	                          <div className="mt-2 border-l-2 border-emerald-200 pl-3">
767	                            <p className="text-sm text-gray-800">{sense.example.en}</p>
768	                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">{sense.example.zh}</p>
769	                          </div>
770	                        </div>
771	                      ))}
772	                    </div>
773	                  ) : (
774	                    <p className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">{currentWord.meaning}</p>
775	                  )}
776	                </div>
777	
778	                {/* 例句：仅当没有 senses 时才单独展示，避免重复 */}
779	                {(!currentWord.senses || currentWord.senses.length === 0) && learningExamples.length > 0 && (
780	                  <div>
781	                    <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">例句</p>
782	                    <div className="space-y-2">
783	                      {learningExamples.map((ex, idx) => (
784	                        <div key={idx} className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-3">
785	                          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
786	                            <div className="flex-1">
787	                              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-800 leading-relaxed">
788	                                <HighlightedSentence sentence={ex.en} word={currentWord.word} />
789	                              </p>
790	                              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">{ex.zh}</p>
791	                            </div>
792	                            <button
793	                              onClick={() => handlePlayExampleAudio(ex.en)}
794	                              className="p-1.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-brand-600 transition shrink-0"
795	                            >
796	                              <Volume2 size={16} />
797	                            </button>
798	                          </div>
799	                        </div>
800	                      ))}
801	                    </div>
802	                  </div>
803	                )}
804	
805	                {/* 词组搭配 */}
806	                {currentWord.phrases && currentWord.phrases.length > 0 && (
807	                  <div>
808	                    <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">常用搭配</p>
809	                    <div className="space-y-2">
810	                      {currentWord.phrases.map((phrase, idx) => (
811	                        <div key={idx} className="bg-amber-50 rounded-xl p-3">
812	                          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
813	                            <div>
814	                              <p className="text-sm font-bold text-amber-900">{phrase.phrase}</p>
815	                              <p className="text-xs text-amber-700 mt-0.5">{phrase.meaning}</p>
816	                              {phrase.example && (
817	                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1 italic">{phrase.example.en}</p>
818	                              )}
819	                            </div>
820	                            {phrase.example && (
821	                              <button
822	                                onClick={() => handlePlayExampleAudio(phrase.example!.en)}
823	                                className="p-1.5 text-amber-400 hover:text-amber-600 transition shrink-0"
824	                              >
825	                                <Volume2 size={14} />
826	                              </button>
827	                            )}
828	                          </div>
829	                        </div>
830	                      ))}
831	                    </div>
832	                  </div>
833	                )}
834	
835	                {/* 记忆提示 */}
836	                <div>
837	                  <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">记忆提示</p>
838	                  <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-xl p-3">
839	                    <p className="text-sm text-purple-800">{memoryHint}</p>
840	                  </div>
841	                </div>
842	
843	                {/* 相关词 */}
844	                {relatedWords.length > 0 && (
845	                  <div>
846	                    <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">相关词</p>
847	                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
848	                      {relatedWords.map((w, idx) => (
849	                        <span key={idx} className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 text-sm rounded-full">
850	                          {w}
851	                        </span>
852	                      ))}
853	                    </div>
854	                  </div>
855	                )}
856	              </div>
857	
858	              {/* 底部按钮 */}
859	              <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-100">
860	                <button
861	                  onClick={() => setShowWordDetail(false)}
862	                  className="w-full py-3 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-xl font-semibold hover:bg-gray-200 transition"
863	                >
864	                  返回学习
865	                </button>
866	              </div>
867	            </motion.div>
868	          </motion.div>
869	        )}
870	      </AnimatePresence>
871	
872	      {/* XP 动画 */}
873	      <AnimatePresence>
874	        {showXpGain && (
875	          <motion.div
876	            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 12, scale: 0.9 }}
877	            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: -10, scale: 1 }}
878	            exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -26, scale: 0.95 }}
879	            transition={{ duration: 0.6 }}
880	            className="fixed bottom-28 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-green-500 text-white font-bold px-4 py-2 rounded-full shadow-lg"
881	          >
882	            +20 XP
883	          </motion.div>
884	        )}
885	      </AnimatePresence>
886	    </div>
887	  )
888	}
